## model

Property name: `model`

Value type: `<string>`

The model property value is a `<string>` that specifies the manufacturer's model number of the device.

The recommended format is: `"manufacturer,model"`, where `manufacturer` is a string describing the name of the manufacturer (such as a stock ticker symbol), and model specifies the model number.

**Example:**

`model = "fsl,MPC8349EMITX";`'s model number of the device.

The recommended format is `"manufacturer,model"`, where `manufacturer` is a string describing the name of the manufacturer (such as a stock ticker symbol), and `model` specifies the model number.

```dts
/* arch/arm64/boot/dts/broadcom/bcm2711-rpi-4-b.dts */
model = "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B";

/* arch/arm/boot/dts/fsl/mpc8349emitx.dts */
model = "fsl,MPC8349EMITX";
```

---

**From binding:**\n\nThe user-visible name of this sound complex

---

**Source:** Linux kernel Documentation\n\n```\n   - model : "ibm,akebono".
   - compatible : "ibm,akebono" , "ibm,476gtr".

1.a) The Secure Digital Host Controller Interface (SDHCI) node

  Represent the Secure Digital Host Controller Interfaces.\n```
